title: Department Manager Vacancy at Pantaloons - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Pantaloons - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Pantaloons! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Rajkot team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Pantaloons:
Pantaloons is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pantaloons!
